channel.title: TTRPG on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in TTRPG on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Traditional Game Mechanics: What I Tried
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about traditional game mechanics and what I tried to do in video games based on those mechanics.

item.title: Adapting TTRPGs vs. Other IPs
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about adapting tabletop role playing games into video games versus adapting a non-game IP into a video game.

item.title: Writing My Own TTRPG
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about writing my own TBL toop roleplaying game.

item.title: Shadowdark
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Shadow dark.

item.title: D&D Influences (By Edition)
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about DND influences by addition.

item.title: GURPS Everything
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about gerps everything, which was an attempt of mine to run a gerps campaign in the 9s using the basic set and every single Source book that I owned — not the World Books, not the ones that had particular settings in them, but all the source books, like the extensions on, like magic and sanics and I’ll talk about that.

item.title: Dice
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about dice.

item.title: An "Off The Rails" TTRPG Campaign
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk to you about an off the rails tabletop RPG campaign.

item.title: Using Geometry To Constrain Dice Rolls
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about using geometry to constrain dice rolls.

item.title: My AD&D Mods
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about modding the original advanced Dungeons and Dragons.

item.title: Tabletop RPG Influences
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about tabletop RPG influences that directly show up in my own computer games.

item.title: Appendix N
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about appendix, and Josh James 582, asked for my thoughts on appendix n, which is in the DM’s guide for advanced Dungeons and Dragons, which lets me show off something I’m super excited about.
